---
title: "test_pennyone.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_pennyone.ts"
loc: 35
complexity: 5
logic_score: 4.68
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 5.43
overall_score: 5.28
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [runScan](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/index)
- [registry](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `testPennyOne`
- `testDir`
- `results`
- `first`
- `statsDir`
- `exists`
